visible_entities.desc: A large, red, cross-shaped banner with white text in a bold, sans-serif font. The text reads 'THE WARSAW PACT', 'FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION', and 'THE COLD WAR'.
A tan, shield-shaped emblem with a red star at the top and Cyrillic text at the bottom reading 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР'.
A row of small national flags, including those of Bulgaria, Hungary, Romania, and Czechoslovakia, draped across the lower part of the emblem.
A faint, grey world map with a grid overlay, serving as the background.

atomic_facts.fact: The title card displays the text 'THE WARSAW PACT' prominently in the center.
The subtitle 'FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION' is visible below the main title.
The phrase 'THE COLD WAR' is displayed at the bottom of the red banner.
The Russian text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is visible on the lower part of the central emblem.

visible_entities.desc: A large, shield-shaped emblem with a gold border and a central red five-pointed star. Inside the star is a red circle containing a gold handshake icon. A gold plaque at the bottom contains Cyrillic text.
A grey world map background with a white grid overlay.

The entire graphic is set against a light grey world map background.
